validation_summary.note: Duplicate IDs and missing required fields are validation failures, not exception-log rows.

unresolved_items.detail: Order was received by the platform but has no transmission timestamp.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Review platform queue/routing state and confirm whether the order should be transmitted, cancelled, or escalated.

unresolved_items.detail: Order was transmitted but has no final status timestamp.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Check downstream execution/bridge response and follow up until a final fill, reject, cancel, fail, or expiry status is recorded.

unresolved_items.detail: Order state is unresolved and has no final status timestamp.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Carry forward to shift handover and confirm the order reaches a final status or is otherwise resolved.

unresolved_items.detail: Order state is unresolved and has no final status timestamp.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Carry forward to shift handover and confirm the order reaches a final status or is otherwise resolved.

non_claims: Static broker operations reporting demo only.
Does not integrate with broker APIs.
Does not prove broker administrator access.
